## Checklist

- [ ] Paper compiles without LaTeX errors
- [ ] All figures are in the `figures/` subdirectory
- [ ] References are in `references.bib`
- [ ] Folder follows naming convention: `papers/YYYY-MM-title/`
- [ ] Abstract is included
- [ ] Implementation considerations section is included
